prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-KNIFE-16IN1 Product Type: MULTITOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife 16 in 1 Adventure Tool, 4 Inch - Black Description: This 16-in-1 tool is perfect for outdoor adventures. Whether you're camping, hunting, or hiking, this pocket knife has you covered.

Made of stainless steel, this multi-functional tool is durable and reliable. This tool is 3.5 inches in length and can easily be tucked away in your pocket or bag.

The knife blade, fish scaler, hook dislodger, and rope saw can be used while hunting and fishing. Utilize the corkscrew, bottle opener, and can opener for food and beverage consumption.

If you're in need of hygiene-focused instruments, the toothpick, tweezers, nail cleaner, and file will come in handy. For repairs and general outdoor gear maintenance, this pocket tool has a Phillips bit, reamer, tent reamer, slotted bit, and scissors for your use.

Featuring a key ring, attach this tool to your keys or lanyard for carrying convenience and easy access. Created to be versatile, you'll enjoy the many uses of these tools. Search Terms: pocket knife folding multi tool set multipurpose toothpick tweezers phillips bit reamer corkscrew nail cleaner file tent slotted bottle opener scissors can This 16-in-1 multi-functional is made of stainless steel and used for outdoor activities Features: - 16 IN 1 MULTI FUNCTION - Tools for every situation | Toothpick, tweezers, Phillips bit, reamer, corkscrew, nail cleaner, file, tent reamer, slotted bit, bottle opener, scissors, can opener, fish scaler, fish hook dislodger, rope saw, & knife blade - POCKET SIZED - 3.5" L x 1" W | Easy to pack for outdoor adventures - STAINLESS STEEL - Durable material | Quality tools in times of need - KEY RING - Can be attached to keys or lanyard | Convenient for travel and access - VERSATILE TOOL - Easy to switch between use of tools === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 16-in-1 Black Folding Pocket Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 4 In Black Folding Pocket Knife 16 In 1 Adventure Tool

tokens.name: Folding Pocket Knife 16 In 1 Adventure Tool

openai.title_differentiation: 16 In 1 Multi Tool, Stainless Steel, Pocket Sized 35 Inch, Key Ring, Camping Fishing Hiking, Durable, Travel Ready
